company.name: Detect Technologies
company.qaRelevance: The QA team primarily validates the functional behavior of industrial dashboards that aggregate AI detections, operational metrics, compliance signals, and zone-based drilldowns.

productContext.overview: Detect Technologies positions T-Pulse as a unified industrial AI platform that brings multiple industrial functions onto a single operational dashboard surface. The platform emphasizes real-time monitoring, risk reduction, compliance visibility, and decision support across safety, operations, inspections, and security.

dashboardFamilies.name: Workplace Safety Dashboards
focusAreas: worker health and environment risk visibility

dashboardFamilies.name: Workplace Operations Dashboards
commonWidgets: filters by site, zone, and date

highValueFunctionalThemes: shared filter propagation across all widgets
zone-based scope retention and drilldown carryover
KPI, chart, and detail-list numerical consistency
alert creation, acknowledgement, escalation, and closure behavior
evidence traceability from summary cards to images, snapshots, or media records
permit or compliance workflow state consistency where applicable
planned vs actual operational metric integrity
performance and stability for multi-widget dashboard refreshes
dashboardInteractionPatternsToTest: clicking chart segments opens the correct scoped detail view
zone color mapping remains consistent across cards and charts
hover states and tooltips expose accurate date/category/value context
shared filters update both top-level KPIs and deeper charts without stale data
drilldowns preserve selected site, zone, and date context
summary indicators match the underlying detailed records
industrialEdgeCases: delayed ingestion for the latest date
evidence available for some records but not others

recommendedRulePacks: Dashboard KPI Cards And Segregation Drilldowns

sources.relevance: Company website and high-level product positioning.
Official T-Pulse brochure describing modules, capabilities, and industrial dashboard use cases.

notes: This record is intended to improve test case curation for dashboard-heavy industrial products rather than to define strict product requirements.
Some dashboard characteristics are inferred from official solution positioning and T-Pulse brochure content, then translated into QA-oriented functional guidance.
